message:
beads: add 47 cross-section deps + priority corrections (Session 18 Pass 2)

Structural improvements to the bead dependency graph:

Priority corrections:
- bd-3t3.1 MVCC Core Types: P2→P1 (highest PageRank, unblocks 24 transitive)
- bd-3t3.7 RCRI SSI data structure: P2→P1 (high betweenness, blocks SSI chain)

§22 Verification Gates → §16 Phase Implementation (9 deps):
- bd-331.2 Phase 1-3 Gates → bd-21r0, bd-2kvo
- bd-331.3 Phase 4-6 Gates → bd-202x, bd-bca.1, bd-bca.2
- bd-331.4 Phase 7-9 Gates → bd-1aaf, bd-3fve
- bd-331.1 Universal Gates → bd-1xds, bd-2ddl

Testing → Implementation (8 deps):
- Fuzz tests → parser + record format
- Lab Runtime → MVCC core types
- Unit Test Matrix → Phase 1-2
- Property Tests → Phase 3 (B-Tree)
- SSI scenarios (3 beads) → Phase 6 (MVCC/SSI)

Cross-section implementation (22 deps):
- RFC 6330 conformance, GF(256) vectorization, ECS layout → GF(256)
- Varint edge cases, SHM hash → DB Header
- WAL checksum recovery → Phase 5
- Wire schemas, group commit, serialized/concurrent → MVCC types
- TxnSlot crash recovery → SharedMemoryLayout
- Cx+Sealed validation → Cx context
- Pratt precedence, CREATE TRIGGER, expression syntax → AST/parser
- VACUUM → Phase 3 (B-Tree)
- SSI witness gates → SSI witness objects
- SSI performance → Phase 6
- C reference → golden-file oracle
- Exclusions test → Phase 1-2
- Permeation map → GF(256)

§17.8 Performance subtask chain (6 deps):
- Container → Phase 1-2
- Measurement → Optimization Loop → Opportunity Matrix
- Baseline Layout → Profiling Cookbook, Golden Checksums

Remaining orphan fixes:
- Summary/key ref → governance
- Isomorphism proof → Phase 6
- Extensions → extension traits
- No-Tokio → workspace structure
- Mechanical sympathy subtasks → appropriate impl beads

Result: Actionable 103→52, Blocked 139→192, zero cycles.
High-leverage cascade beads identified: bd-18zh(5), bd-1a32(5),
bd-1hi.1(5), bd-21r0(5), bd-3go.1(7).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
